       arXiv:2502.13458  (cs)
     
 
   
     
  [Submitted on 19 Feb 2025 ( v1 ), last revised 27 May 2025 (this version, v2)] 
     Title: ThinkGuard: Deliberative Slow Thinking Leads to Cautious Guardrails 
     Authors: Xiaofei Wen ,  Wenxuan Zhou ,  Wenjie Jacky Mo ,  Muhao Chen              View a PDF of the paper titled ThinkGuard: Deliberative Slow Thinking Leads to Cautious Guardrails, by Xiaofei Wen and 3 other authors 
     View PDF 
     HTML (experimental) 



     
             Abstract: Ensuring the safety of large language models (LLMs) is critical as they are deployed in real-world applications. Existing guardrails rely on rule-based filtering or single-pass classification, limiting their ability to handle nuanced safety violations. To address this, we propose ThinkGuard, a critique-augmented guar
